use_cases: Numeric counter for tracking quantities or inventory in dashboards and forms
Step counter for multi-step processes like wizards or onboarding flows
Simple value selector for quantity inputs in e-commerce or order systems
Interactive counter for displaying and adjusting numeric values in real-time
Basic increment/decrement control for managing counts in various applications
ai_summary: A lightweight, reusable counter component featuring increment and decrement buttons with state management. Designed for tracking numeric values in interfaces, this minimal component serves as a foundational element for quantity selectors, inventory displays, and step-by-step navigation systems.
